survivors_flagged.one_line: Active Life Sciences & Healthcare sale process (Morgan Stanley advisor, multiple parties in diligence) to delever and refocus; outcome forward, not fired.
Data-rich 2026: budoprutug ITP data June, CLYM116 PK/PD mid-2026, pMN/SLE Q4 readouts; runway into 2028, micro-cap binary asymmetry.

Distressed CRE-debt turnaround: refinanced 2026 Term Loan B with HPS, resolving a $3.7B watchlist book and deleveraging toward a Phase-2 origination restart late-2026; book-value-vs-resolution mispricing.
Carronade won 2 board seats vs ~21% NAV discount; live capital-allocation/distribution + public-holdings rationalization agenda — real structural hardening, no single hard date yet.

Lugano fraud forced FY22-24 restatement; Jun-2026 Ch.11 settlement establishes recovery framework + Sterno sale — own the suppressed underlying with dated milestones into the liquidation/recovery, SEC/DOJ overhang the risk.
Bezuclastinib NonAdvSM NDA accepted, PDUFA Dec-30-2026, no AdCom flagged — one real dated binary + launch ramp, but largely de-risked by positive SUMMIT data so asymmetry is modest.

Sieve Capital pushing full strategic-review/sale (incl. carving the ~$1.5B European ops) with live inbound interest from Constellation Cold/CubeCold + prior Ancora cooperation deal — real activist+structural, May-18 vote passed but review live.
Live all-cash buyout by Angelini at $31.50; HSR/FTC cleared, holder vote Jul-8-2026, Q3 close — clean dated arb (stock $31.45, ~0.2% spread).

Live Elliott (9.9%) activist + ongoing strategic review; standstill expires ~30d before 2026 AGM advance-notice deadline (now) and divestitures executing — hardening trigger, sale optionality re-opens.
Tanbreez HREE: pilot plant targeted Aug 2026 + EXIM/$1.5B Saudi JV funding stack, but first production 2028-29 and stock partly re-rated — dated milestones, distant payoff.
Petrus activist pushed strategic-alternatives review + dated France-to-Luxembourg redomicile targeted Q3-2026 enabling expanded buybacks — structural event with activist overhang.

Affiliate Raizen filed R$65.1B out-of-court reorganization; Cosan wrote stake to zero and is deleveraging via asset sales toward dissolving its holdco — real structural thread, soft dates, high Brazil risk.
CytomX CX-2051 (Varseta-M) colorectal Phase 1 data readout dated Q1/mid-2026, but it's an early dose-escalation read with a well-telegraphed run-up; asymmetry not clearly mispriced.
Corteva confirmed a tax-free separation into two listed cos (Crop Protection + Seed/Pioneer) dated H2 2026, CEOs named; clean dated spin-off, own the pre-split underlying.
Live merger-arb: Mission Produce acquiring Calavo at $27.00 cash+stock (announced Jan 14 2026), trading ~$26.09 = ~3.5% gross spread, deal pending close.
Core aficamten oHCM approval already fired (launched Jan-2026); forward MAPLE-HCM sNDA PDUFA Nov-14-2026 is a dated binary but a modest-asymmetry label expansion.
Icahn (2 board seats) pushing digital-business spin-off + RE monetization with a YE-2026 4x-leverage target; genuine activist-structural special situation.
